headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -74.5)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 50% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 138 quotes where 113 hit strong intensity - people are really fired up today.
• At 74.7, frustration levels sit in the upper half of the typical range but well below the 96-day peak.
• Optimism improved from yesterday's deeper negative but remains below average, while fears dropped significantly.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
